signals.author: Recon Review and Next Steps
signals.text:
Meeting: Recon Review and Next Steps
Attendees: Brian Clark, Thiruselvam Tholtan (Finance), Minor Hotels finance team. Duration 1h19m.

WEBVTT

Brian: Two settlement report defects are blocking. First, fee currency conversion is showing USD instead of the hotel currency ZAR, which creates a 16x overcharge in the reports. Second, the exchange-rate fields contain timestamps instead of dates, so finance can't audit-verify them.
Finance (Thiru's team): We don't want hotels managing wallet payouts. Money should flow to hotels automatically — automate daily payouts at 3:00 PM. Each manual payout currently costs $1.50.
Brian: Agreed — we'll request Juspay automate daily payouts at 3 PM and simplify the hotel report to three fields: transaction amount, total fees, net payout. Detailed fee breakdowns move to a separate analytics report.
Finance: Reconciliation automation is a prerequisite before we approve scaling beyond beta.
Brian: Opera integration progress is blocked — Tiru did not attend, OHIP webhook timeline still unknown.
